monte_carlo.description: Design must meet specs at mean +/- 4.5 sigma across MC samples

offset_mv.description: Input-referred offset voltage (worst-case across PVT corners and MC mean +/- 4.5 sigma)

rise_time_delay_ns.description: Rise-time delay from clock edge to valid output (worst-case across PVT corners and MC mean +/- 4.5 sigma)
